title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.320 - Mayor to sign all commissions and appointments — bond approval by mayor
text:
77.320.  Mayor to sign all commissions and appointments — bond approval by mayor. — The mayor shall sign the commissions and appointments of all city officers elected or appointed in the city, and shall approve all official bonds.
(RSMo 1939 § 6872, A.L. 1990 H.B. 986) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6726; 1919 § 8213; 1909 § 9150
